message.content: @startuml skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 skinparam classFontStyle bold skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5 skinparam classBorderColor black skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #F5F5F5 skinparam classHeaderFontStyle bold skinparam classHeaderFontSize 14 skinparam classBodyFontStyle normal skinparam classBodyFontSize 12 skinparam classFooterFontStyle normal skinparam classFooterFontSize 12 class "E_LCD_Config_Font" as E_LCD_Config_Font { <> Allows to define a data representing a font size on LCD. -- LCD_CONFIG_FONT_5x8 LCD_CONFIG_FONT_5x10 } note top of E_LCD_Config_Font E end note @enduml
